nasb.text: He called the name of that place Bethel; however, previously the name of the city had been Luz.

esv.text: He called the name of that place Bethel, but the name of the city was Luz at the first.

cnv.text: 他就給那地方起名叫伯特利，但那城起初名叫路斯。

ccb.text: 他称那地方为伯特利，那地方以前叫路斯。

csbs.text: 他就给那地方起名为伯特利；不过那城先前名叫路斯。
